name: Lollipop Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: Assorted decorations (baking chips, raisins, red hots, snipped dried fruit, coconut, nuts, colored sugar, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 15 Minutes
Chill Time: 2 hours
Bake Time: 8-10 Minutes
1. Cream the Butter Flavor Crisco, sugar, milk and vanilla in a large bowl at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Beat in egg.
2. Combine flour, baking powder and salt. Mix into the creamed mixture. Cover and refrigerate several hours to overnight.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F.
4. Shape dough into 1 1/2 inch balls. Push an ice cream stick into the center of each ball. Place dough with sticks parallel, about 3 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet. Flatten to 1/2 inch with a large, smooth, greased and floured spatula. Decorate as desired. Press decorations into dough.
5. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes. Cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before removing to a cooling rack.
Makes 1 1/2 to 2 dozen 3 inch cookies.
